title: ClientCapes
description: Add your own custom cape to your Minecraft character
body:
## Features
________________________________________________________________________________________________
PNG and animated GIF capes — static images and frame-by-frame animations both work
Any 2:1 resolution — 64×32, 128×64, 256×128 and higher all supported, no forced downscaling
Adjustable animation speed — multiplier from 0.25× to 4× over the native GIF speed
Enable/disable toggle — turn the cape off without losing your selection
ModMenu integration — open settings directly from the mod list
________________________________________________________________________________________________
## How to use
Put your .png or .gif file into **.minecraft/config/custom_capes/**
Open ModMenu → CustomCapes → pick your cape from the list
Done
The cape must have a 2:1 aspect ratio (width = 2 × height). Recommended size: 64×32 or 128×64.
________________________________________________________________________________________________
## Notes
**Only you** can **see** your **own cape** — this mod is client-side only and **does not sync capes between players**
GIF frames are composited correctly, including delta-frame animations
________________________________________________________________________________________________
